name: RADNOSTIX INC
business: Radnostix Inc. manufactures radioisotope-based products for medical and industrial applications, operating through five segments: Theranostics Products (radiopharmaceuticals), Cobalt Products (cobalt-60 sealed sources), Calibration & Reference Products (sealed sources for imaging equipment), Medical Devices (under development), and Fluorine Products (uranium de-conversion on hold). The company sells its products to radiopharmacies, clinics, research organizations, and industrial operators, primarily in the U.S. and internationally.

exposures.sentence: This segment includes the production and distribution of various isotopically pure radiopharmaceuticals, APIs, and radiochemicals for medical, industrial, and research applications.

Our Cobalt Products segment includes the production of various cobalt-60 products and services, including the fabrication of cobalt-60 sealed sources for radiation therapy, various industrial and medical applications, and recycling of expended cobalt-60 sources.

The Calibration & Reference Products segment consists of various sealed source calibration and reference products, including our own manufactured products, jointly manufactured products, and third-party products.
Our Medical Device segment will consist of our own medical devices and the distribution and servicing of third-party products.
We will evaluate all possible options for the DUF6 Plant and related assets.

catalysts.event: Mutual termination of DUF6 asset purchase agreement
catalysts.sentence: On March 11, 2026, we executed a mutual termination of an asset purchase agreement ('DUF6 APA') dated February 8, 2024 to sell all our assets related to the Fluorine Products segment and the Planned Uranium De-Conversion Facility to American Fuel Resources ('AFR').

catalysts.event: Complete development of EasyFill Automated Capsule system
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete development of the EasyFill Automated Capsule system in the first half of 2026.
we expect to relaunch the first products from the RadVent portfolio before the end of the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Rollout of EasyFill Automated Capsule System
catalysts.sentence: We are targeting a roll out in the third quarter of 2026 and a commercial ramp up in the second quarter of 2027, including additional sales of I-131.

catalysts.event: Complete fit-out and receive NRC operational license for Calibration & Reference Products facility
catalysts.sentence: We plan to continue to invest in that facility in 2026 to complete the fit-out and receive an NRC operational license.

tamClaims.claim: Theranostics market valued at $4.3 billion in 2024, expected to grow to $12.7 billion by 2029 at 24% CAGR.
tamClaims.sentence: According to BCC Research, the theranostics market was valued at $4.3 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow to $12.7 billion by 2029, reflecting a 24% compound annual growth rate.

tamClaims.claim: At least 131 countries have SPECT and/or PET imaging cameras with more than 29,000 installed units as of September 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the International Atomic Energy Agency’s Medical imAGIng and Nuclear mEdicine global resources database (IMAGINE), as of September 2025, at least 131 countries have SPECT and/or PET imaging cameras, with more than 29,000 installed units in total.

tamClaims.claim: Over 140 countries have SPECT and/or PET cameras with more than 33,000 installed units.
tamClaims.sentence: Over 140 countries have availability of SPECT and/or PET cameras, with more than 33,000 installed units in total.

tamClaims.claim: More than 400 radiopharmacy and CDMO sites use lab equipment relying on calibration and reference standards.
tamClaims.sentence: We believe that there are more than 400 radiopharmacy and CDMO sites which use lab equipment that relies on calibration and reference standards.
